description_long: This is a multi-strand necklace featuring alternating beads in warm orange, white, and metallic tones, arranged in a symmetrical pattern. The strands converge at a central, triangular metallic connector, from which two beaded tassels hang down, adding a sense of movement and elegance. The beads appear to be made of glass or semi-precious stones, interspersed with metallic spacers that enhance the visual rhythm. The necklace is displayed on a matte black bust, which accentuates the contrast and vibrancy of the beads. The overall design is intricate, with a balanced mix of colors and textures, suggesting a handcrafted or artisanal origin. The piece exudes a bohemian or ethnic-inspired motif, suitable for both casual and formal urban settings.
description: A multi-strand beaded necklace with orange, white, and metallic beads, converging at a central metallic connector with hanging tassels. The design is intricate and visually striking, with a bohemian flair.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full necklace with its multi-strand beaded pattern, central metallic connector, and hanging tassels.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the layered strands and the way the necklace drapes over the bust, with beads visible along the upper edge.
description_view_2: Rear view shows the back of the bust with only the uppermost part of the necklace visible, emphasizing the closure area.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the necklace's drape and bead arrangement along the upper edge.
